title: Kenyan Style Vegan Chicken Pilaf
description: A flavorful, vegan alternative to traditional chicken pilaf, inspired by Kenyan cuisine. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the pilau masala and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the brown rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the orange juice and 2 cups of water to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
Fluff the rice mixture with a fork and stir in the frozen peas.
